core_mechanism: dynamical back-action coupling between two co-localized resonant modes, in which the energy stored in one mode exerts a displacement-dependent gradient force on a mechanical oscillator, renormalizing that oscillator's effective stiffness (a spring-constant shift) and its damping rate depending on the detuning between the modes
brief_reason: The abstract's 'giant optical spring effect' from the strong per-photon gradient force is a stiffness renormalization, and the 'blue-detuned opto-mechanical damping' is a detuning-dependent damping shift, both signatures of energy in one co-localized mode reacting back on the dynamics of the other.
